name: Guirenniao Co., Ltd.
summary: Guirenniao Co., Ltd. researches and develops, designs, produces, and sells sports shoes and apparel under the Guirenniao, AND1, and PRINCE brands in China and internationally. The company provides sports clothing, equipment, and accessories, as well as hats. It also sells its products online, as well as engages in the online store agency operation. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Xiamen, China.
